programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Steve races to remote bushland where a huge tree has fallen and crushed a man’s leg. Cullen takes drastic action to save a critically ill patient. Homesick Emily ‘adopts’ a Nanna for the day, when she and Steve help a much-loved Gran.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: In a horror high speed crash, a young woman is thrown out the rear window of her car. Steve is forced to take drastic action to try to save a critically ill patient and an emotional final shift together for great friends, Leonard and Nat

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Dr Caitlin and Dr Michael fear a motorbike rider might lose his foot after a shocking crash. Dr Laura and Dr Mark bend over backwards to help a woman with a dislocated hip. Dr Emma examines a young man who is comfortably numb.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
